=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 5/8/03, Portsmouth, Virginia, 2CDR

Great sound, The Waifs set at end 

1 Intro, 2 Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano), 3 Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 4 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 5 Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 6 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 7 I'll Remember You (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 8 Drifter's Escape (Bob on electric guitar and harp), 9 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic), (Bob on acoustic guitar, Larry on pedal steel), 10 Dignity (Bob on piano), 11 Saving Grace (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 12 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 13 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 14 Floater (Too Much To Ask), (Bob on piano, Freddie on violin, Tony on standup bass),

CD2

1 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 2 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 3 All Along The Watchtower, (Bob on piano and electric guitar, Bruce Hornsby on piano) 4-11 show opener The Waifs, (the Waifs... opening act) , 4. Lighthouse, 5. Fisherman's Daughter, 6. -story-, 7. Bridal Train, 8. London Still, 9. ???, 10. Crazy Train, 11. When I die 


Concert # 1516 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 15 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 26.
Concert # 15 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1-6, 9-15 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 4, 6, 8, 10 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
4, 7, 16 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
7, 8 Bob Dylan (guitar).
8 acoustic with band.
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
13 Freddie Koella (violin).
16 Bruce Hornsby (piano).
